text:
There once was a wise old fox who could learn anything. He learned all the secrets of the forest. In fact, he learned how to keep out.

One day, a clever young fox wanted to know how to keep bad things away. "Oh," said the old fox, rubbing his chin. "There is a castle just over there. There was a very bad evil wolf.

The fox knew about this wolf. He knew this wolf would come any time...

Don't ever get...

Don't bother them.
